name: Manhattan-Style Clam Chowder
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Parsley (fresh flat leaf, finely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy pot, cook bacon with onion, parsley, and black pepper for about 5 minutes.
2. Add the bay leaf, minced celery, and minced green pepper; cook for 15 minutes.
3. Add juice from minced clams, clam juice, reserved liquid from tomatoes, diced potatoes, and water. Simmer for 25 more minutes.
4. Add the remaining clams, chopped tomatoes, and second bottle of clam juice. Adjust seasoning with salt and black pepper.
5. Stir in butter; sprinkle top with parsley. Serve with crusty garlic bread or oyster crackers.
